A space equals open parentheses table row 3 cell negative 4 end cell row 2 1 end table close parentheses comma space B space equals space open parentheses table row cell negative 3 end cell cell negative 2 end cell row cell negative 1 end cell 5 end table close parentheses comma space d a n space C space equals space open parentheses table row 5 4 row cell negative 2 end cell cell negative 1 end cell end table close parentheses.
